content.subtitle: Logging In
content.text: To log into your account, do as follows: 1. Enter your Username and Password. 2. Then click Login button.
If this is your first time logging into the system with a new temporary password, you will be asked to change your password and provide a security answer.

On changing your password, please be reminded of the following rules: 1. Your password should be at least eight (8) and at most fifteen (15) characters long. 2. Your password should contain a combination of letters (A-Z, a-z), numbers (0-9). 3. Your password may or may not have special characters. 4. Password is case sensitive.

text.1: In case of erroneous login information supplied, you will be asked to supply correct Captcha along with your logon credentials.
text.2: You can change the Captcha characters displayed by the system by clicking the refresh button.
text.3: You can click the audio icon to hear audio playback of Captcha character displayed.
text.4: Captcha characters are not case sensitive.

content.subtitle: Logging Out
content.text: To log out of your account, do as follows: 1. Click the Logout link on Header Menu bar.

text.1: Upon successful log out, you will be redirected to the Login page.
text.2: You will be automatically logged out of the system if no actions were performed within 30 minutes. The system will require you to log into your account once again.
text.3: Your session will expire if a new session was detected for your account.

content.text: To change your password, do as follows: 1. From the home page, click the Change Password link on header menu bar. 2. Enter your current password. 3. Enter your new password. 4. Re-enter your new password for verification.

On changing your password, please be reminded of the  following rules: Your password should be at least eight (8) and at most fifteen (15) characters long. Your password should contain a combination of letters (A-Z, a-z), numbers (0-9)  Your password may or may not have special characters. Password is case sensitive.

In case of a forgotten password, you can acquire a new password by performing the following steps: 1. On the Login page, click the Forgot Password link, located on the left side of the screen. 2. Enter your Username and Email Address. 3. Supply correct Captcha character. Then click Submit button. 4. On Challenge Question page, supply your security answer. 5. Then click the Submit button

text.1: After validating your account, you will receive a system-generated password sent to your email address

content.text: If your account was locked due to invalid login attempts, you can unlock it by performing the following steps: 1. On the Login page, click the Unlock Account link, located on the left side of the screen. 2.Enter your Username and Email Address. 3. Supply correct Captcha character. Then click Submit button. 4. On Challenge Question page, supply your security answer. 5. Then click the Submit button.

text.1: If the Unlocking account is successful you may now login with your current username and password.

content.subtitle: Viewing Account Details
content.text: To view your account details, do as follows: On the homepage, click the Account Settings link on the header menu bar.
You will be directed to View Account Details page where you can view and modify your account details.

content.subtitle: Modifying Account Details
content.text: To modify your account details, do as follows: 1. Under the Account Settings page, click Update Account Details button. 2. Supply the fields you wish to change. 3. Click Save button.
You can only modify your address, zip code, telephone number, challenge question and answer.

content.subtitle: Adding a New Contact Person
content.text: To create or add a contact person, do as follows: 1. Under the Remitting Agency Contact Persons panel, click the Add Contact button. 2. Enter Name, Position and Contact Information. 3. Click Save button to add new Contact Person to the list.

content.subtitle: Viewing Contact Person
content.text: To view contact person, do as follows: 1. Click the name of the Contact Person under Remitting Agency Contact Persons panel.
You can modify and delete contact person under View Contact Details page.

content.subtitle: Modifying Contact Person
content.text: To modify/update details of a Contact Person, do as follows: 1. Click Modify button on View Contact Details Page. 2. Enter contact details you wish to modify. 3. Then click Save button.

content.subtitle: Deleting Contact Person
content.text: To delete a Contact Person, do as follows: 1. Click the name of the Contact Person. 2. Click Delete button.

content.subtitle: Searching Electronic Billing File
content.text: To search for an electronic billing file, do as follows: 1.Click Billing Search link on the side menu bar. 2. Enter Office Code or Agency Name: a. Office Code b. Agency Name 3. Click Search button.

text.1: Only the most recent 12 months Electronic Billing Files will be displayed.
text.2: Retrieval of billing files beyond the 12-month period can be requested at your respective GSIS Handling Branch.

content.subtitle: Managing Billing Search Results
content.text: On your Search Results  panel, you can: 1. Export results in Excel or PDF file 2. Filter search results 3. Navigate through search results pages 4. Change the number of records displayed 5. Sort search results.
To export the search results into an Excel or PDF file, do as follows: In the Search Result panel, click  to export the list as an Excel file or button to export the list as a PDF file.

To navigate through the result list pages, do as follows: 1 Click the page number to go to a specific page. 2. Click the First Page button to go to the first page. 3. Click the Last Page button to go to the last page. 4. Click the Next Page button to go to the next page. 5. Click the Previous Page button to go back to the previous page.
To change the number of records displayed per page, do as follows: 1. Click 5 on Search Result panel. 2. Select the number of records you wish to display
Search results will automatically be refreshed upon changing number of records displayed.

To sort search results, do as follows: 1. Click the table header you wish to sort once to sort by ascending order. 2. Click the table header you wish to sort twice to sort by descending order. 3. Click the table header thrice to revert to original.

content.subtitle: Downloading Electronic Billing File
content.text: To download Electronic Billing File, do as follows: 1. Click Download (arrow down) on Action column of the Search Results panel. 2. Locate the destination where you want to save the file. Then click the Save button.

text.1: Billing file may automatically be saved on your local Downloads folder depending on your browser.
text.2: The default filename of an Electronic Billing File is <last two digit of due year (13) and due month (01-12>_<Handing GSIS Branch>_<Agency Code>.zip
text.3: You can change the filename upon saving to local or network folder.

content.subtitle: Uploading Electronic Remittance File
content.text: To upload electronic remittance file, do as follows: 1. Click the ERF Upload link in the side menu bar. 2. Supply values in the following search criteria, if applicable: a. Office Code;  or b. Agency Name 3. Select the Sub-Agency from the dropdown list, if applicable. 4. Click the Electronic Remittance File field. Then select the file you wish to upload. 5. Click the Upload button.

text.1: To clear selection, click Clear button.
text.2: To indicate your remittance file’s specific sub-agency on the Summary of Totals (SOT) report, select the desired sub-agency in the dropdown list.

text.1: Upload speed is dependent on the speed of your Internet connection and the size of the file being uploaded.
text.2: Uploading of your ERF will not be processed if the internet connection during upload is interrupted. If this incident happens, you may upload your ERF again.
text.3: Only remittance file in zip format containing one (1) .xls or three (3) .prn files will be accepted by the system.
text.4: Uploading of ERF for the same agency and same due month will be allowed by the system given that the filename is unique.

text.1: Your Excel ERFs could contain multiple sheets (1 sheet per due month).
text.2: Excel ERF column names should follow the standard naming convention set by GSIS (i.e. PS, GS, EC, etc.)

text.1: Filename of your text files inside the zip should contain the following identifier: 1. H - To identify .prn file containing the Agency details. 2. M -To identify .prn file containing Member details. 3. D - To identify .prn files containing Remittance details of each member.
text.2: Your text ERF file will not be accepted if the last character of the .PRN files does not contain the above-mentioned identifiers.

content.subtitle: Re-uploading of Electronic Remittance File
content.text: If you wish to update an existing remittance file, do as follows: 1. Click Upload (arrow up) button located at the right most corner of the Electronic Remittance File Search Results panel, under the Actions column. 2. On Re-upload Electronic Remittance File page, click   Electronic Remittance File field. 3. Select Electronic Remittance File to you wish to re-upload. 4. Click the Upload button.

text.1: Re-uploading of ERF file with different filename will not be allowed.
text.2: Re-uploading would cause previously uploaded file to be overwritten.
text.3: You are only allowed to re-upload an ERF with status “Uploaded”, “Passed” or “Below Threshold”.

content.subtitle: Searching Electronic Billing File
content.text: To search for an Electronic Remittance File, do as follows: 1. Click ERF Inquiry link in the side menu bar. 2. Supply the following search criteria, if applicable: a. Office code b. Agency name c. From (Due month) d.To (Due month) e. Status 3. Click the Search button.

content.subtitle: Managing Remittance Search Results
content.text: On your Search Results  panel, you can: 1. Export results in Excel or PDF file 2. Filter search results 3. Navigate through search results pages 4. Change the number of records displayed  5. Sort Search results

To export the search results into an Excel or PDF file, do as follows: In the Search Result panel, click Excel icon to export the list as an Excel file or PDF icon button to export the list as a PDF file.

To filter search results, do as follows: 1. Click the textbox that corresponds to the column you wish to search from. 2. Enter search parameter/text. 3. Click the search icon or press ENTER. To clear search results filter, click the reload icon.

To navigate through the result list pages, do as follows: 1 Click the page number to go to a specific page. 2. Click the First Page button to go to the first page. 3. Click the Last Page button to go to the last page. 4. Click the Next Page button to go to the next page. 5. Click the Previous Page button to go back to the previous page.
To change number of records displayed per page, do as follows: 1. Click 5 on Search Result panel. 2. Select the number of records you wish to display.
Search results will automatically be refreshed upon changing number of records displayed.

To sort search results, do as follows: 1. Click the table header you wish to sort once to sort by ascending order. 2. Click the table header you wish to sort twice to sort by descending order. 3. Click the table header thrice to revert to original.
This is an example of a table header 'Type of Action'

content.subtitle: Downloading an Electronic Remittance File
content.text: To download an Electronic Remittance File, do as follows: 1. Click Download (arrow down) icon on Action column of the Search Results panel. 2. Locate the destination where you want to save the file. Then click the Save button.

text.1: Remittance file may automatically be saved on your local Downloads folder depending on your browser.
text.2: You can change the filename upon saving to local or network folder

content.subtitle: Viewing Electronic Remittance File Details
content.text: To view Electronic Remittance File details, do as follows: In the Search Results panel, click the Filename of the Electronic Remittance File you want to view.
